responsibilities: Develop and maintain 3 Angular and 5 Svelte customer service portals serving Allianz insurance customers across Europe, Australia, and Asia.
Led the upgrade of existing Angular applications to Angular 21, adopting Signals, Standalone Components, and the new control flow syntax to modernize the codebase and improve runtime performance.

Built MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, AI agents, and AI agent workflows to display policy details and real-time notifications on the Customer Service Portal (CSP) dashboard, delivering intelligent, personalized experiences for insurance customers.
Integrated Generative AI capabilities using OpenAI APIs and LangChain.js to enhance self-service customer workflows and automated content generation.
Designed and maintained GitHub Actions workflows for automated build, test, and deployment pipelines, streamlining release cycles across multiple environments.
Implemented PCI-DSS compliant payment functionality in Angular, reducing payment processing time by 25% and elevating user experience.
Configured Adobe Analytics tracking across the CSP, enabling actionable insights into page views and user interactions.
Achieved 80%+ unit test coverage for Angular and Svelte components using Jest, significantly reducing production defects.
achievements: Awarded Certificate of Appreciation in December 2024 for delivering quarterly releases of the customer service portal for Australian and European markets.
Completed AI Passport certification (Allianz Technology, April 2026) and Claude Code in Action (Anthropic, March 2026).

responsibilities: Designed and developed dynamic Angular 12 components, custom directives, and reactive data flows using TypeScript and RxJS, improving application performance by 20%.
Led code reviews and enforced SOLID principles across the frontend codebase, reducing technical debt by 30%.
Optimized state management with NgRx (Redux pattern), achieving 15% faster application load times.
Built intuitive user interaction screens with HTML5, SCSS, Bootstrap, and KendoUI, supporting a 25% increase in customer retention.
Containerized and deployed services using Docker, NGINX, and Node.js within microservice-based environments.
Delivered 80% unit test coverage using Jasmine and Karma, reducing production issues by 40%.
achievements: Awarded the STAR Award in August 2020 for code optimization and reaching 80% unit test coverage in Angular.

responsibilities: Developed and maintained enterprise web applications using Angular 6, .NET Framework, and SQL Server, sustaining 99.9% uptime.
Modernized legacy modules by migrating them to Angular, improving maintainability and developer velocity.
Led the development of data-processing web applications in ASP.NET MVC, increasing data-entry efficiency by 25%.
Built reusable UI modules and contributed to end-to-end product release cycles.
